filesystem.description: Read project files during multi-file reasoning and review workflows

git.description: Git log, diff, blame for RCA, code review, and WHY analysis

postgres.description: Read-only database access for schema inspection. Use a read-only role — never write to payment tables from AI tooling.

brave-search.description: Web search for ISO 8583 spec lookups, Laravel/Go docs, package research

sequential-thinking.description: Extended reasoning chains for complex payment flow analysis and architecture decisions
